title: OCI Network Firewall Policy Modified
description: Detects modifications to OCI Network Firewall policies. Unauthorized changes could weaken network security posture or create bypass routes.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.networkfirewall.updatenetworkfirewallpolicy' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.networkfirewall.deletenetworkfirewall' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.networkfirewall.updatenetworkfirewall')))
falsepositives: Routine policy changes by authorized administrators
